site.title: Andrea Piscioneri — UX/UI Designer & Developer
site.description: Portfolio of Andrea Piscioneri. UX/UI designer, web designer & developer, graphic designer based in Lombardy, Italy. Digital design, brand identity and web development projects.
site.tagline: Design that thinks, code that listens.

home.heroDescription: I design interfaces, websites and digital brands. I currently work at Denani S.R.L. as UX/UI designer, and I build products with Nuxt, Next and Vue. Graduated with honors in Graphic Design (Santa Giulia) and Master's in Digital Design & Communication (LABA) 110/110 cum laude.
home.featuredSubtitle: A selection of recent work across design, development and digital branding.
home.aboutSectionBody: From my first graphic internship at MBE to my current role as UX/UI designer at Denani, I've moved across every layer of visual design and development. Today I blend research, UI, motion and code to ship products that really work.

services.title: UX/UI Design
services.body: Research, wireframes, prototypes and complete design systems.

services.title: Web Development
services.body: Nuxt, Next, Vue, React. Fast, accessible, SEO-ready websites.

services.title: Brand Identity
services.body: Naming, logo, visual system, guidelines and collateral.

services.title: 3D & Motion
services.body: Cinema 4D, Blender, motion graphics, product rendering.

services.title: Odoo & Apps
services.body: Custom Odoo modules and native mobile applications.

work.title: Work
work.subtitle: All projects: digital design, development, brand and graphics.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Designer, developer, photographer. From Albino (BG), Italy — with European ambition.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: If you have a project, an idea or just a question — drop me a line.

footer.tagline: Design that thinks, code that listens.

dataProcessing.title: Data Processing
dataProcessing.subtitle: Information on the processing of personal data pursuant to EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information on the processing of personal data pursuant to EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
privacy.dataText: The site only collects data voluntarily provided by the user via the contact form: name, email address and message. No other personal data is collected without explicit consent.
privacy.purposeText: Data is processed solely to respond to contact requests. It is not used for commercial purposes, shared with third parties or used for profiling.
privacy.basisText: Processing is based on the data subject's explicit consent (art. 6, par. 1, lit. a, GDPR) given at the time of submitting the contact form.
privacy.retentionText: Data is retained for the time strictly necessary to manage the communication and in any case no longer than 12 months from the last contact.
privacy.rightsIntro: As a data subject you have the right to:
rights: Withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing
privacy.rightsText: To exercise your rights write to: andrypiscioneri{'@'}gmail.com
privacy.complaintText: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent data protection authority.
privacy.transferText: Data is not transferred to third countries outside the European Union.
privacy.thirdPartyText: This site does not integrate third-party tracking, analytics or advertising services. The only data transmitted to external systems is email correspondence to respond to contact requests.
privacy.cookieLinkText: For information on cookies see the

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.subtitle: Information on the use of cookies in accordance with applicable privacy regulations.
cookie.introText: Cookies are small text files saved in the user's browser when visiting a website. They can be session cookies (deleted when the browser is closed) or persistent (retained for a defined period).
cookie.usageText: This site uses only essential technical cookies necessary for the correct functioning of the site. No profiling, behavioural tracking or advertising cookies are installed.
cookie.technicalText: Technical cookies do not require user consent as they are strictly necessary for the service requested.

cookies.name: ap-color-mode
cookies.purpose: Stores the theme preference (light / dark / system)

cookies.name: i18n_redirected
cookies.purpose: Stores the language selected by the user

cookie.noTrackingText: This site does not install any first-party or third-party profiling cookies. No analytics (e.g. Google Analytics), advertising or social tracking services are used.
cookie.thirdPartyText: The site does not integrate services that install third-party cookies. Project images are loaded from external CDNs (Behance, Altervista) without tracking functionality.
cookie.manageText: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling technical cookies may affect the correct functioning of the site.
